title: Expanded Ancient Debris Veins
body:
## Bigger Ancient Debris Veins
Tired of finding just one or two Ancient Debris at a time? This datapack boosts the size of Ancient Debris veins in the Nether, making your ancient hunting trips much more rewarding!
Veins can now generate with more blocks, meaning you'll spend less time mining and more time crafting that full set of Netherite gear. Balanced to keep the challenge, but with a satisfying upgrade to your mining experience.


_Drop it into your datapacks folder and enjoy the upgrade <3_
_(x-ray was used to check if the Datapack is working. I don't recomend using X-ray in any servers.)_
